response.justification: Bogdan is massively overqualified for this junior/mid-level role. While he exceeds all technical requirements with 15+ years of professional experience currently working as a Staff Engineer, hiring him would create significant retention risk and likely result in rapid departure. His background in architecture, leadership, and complex systems work indicates expectations misaligned with entry-level development tasks focused on learning and progression.
strengths: Exceptional TypeScript, React, and full-stack expertise with production-scale systems handling millions of requests
Proven ability to architect solutions across entire stack including databases, APIs, infrastructure, and DevOps
Strong commitment to testing, clean architecture, and knowledge sharing through workshops and mentoring
concerns: Massive overqualification—Staff Engineer with 15+ years experience unlikely to accept or remain satisfied in junior-level role
Current location in Lagos with high on-site presence requirement creates logistical uncertainty
No Nest.js experience, though background suggests strong capability to learn it quickly
